---
title: "`r if (exists('reportTitle')) reportTitle else 'Shotgun DA'`"
output:
  html_document:
    highlight: pygments
    theme: sand
    code_folding: hide
    toc: yes
    toc_depth: 4
    df_print: paged
    self_contained: true
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: inline
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(warning = FALSE, message = FALSE, echo = FALSE,
                      fig.width = 12, fig.height = 8, cache = TRUE)
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = ".")

library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(tibble)
library(stringr)
library(phyloseq)
library(biomformat)
library(microbiome)
library(vegan)
library(reshape2)
library(scales)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(patchwork)
library(ggpubr)
library(ggrepel)
library(DT)
library(htmlwidgets)
library(htmltools)
library(plotly)
library(kableExtra)
library(EnhancedVolcano)
```

```{r register_widget_deps, include=FALSE}
## Force-register plotly + DT JS dependencies at the top level. Some interactive
## widgets are produced deep inside helper functions; knit_meta does not always
## propagate their deps back, leaving the widgets as blank containers.
local({
  for (d in htmltools::findDependencies(plotly::plot_ly()))
    knitr::knit_meta_add(list(d))
  for (d in htmltools::findDependencies(DT::datatable(data.frame(x = 1))))
    knitr::knit_meta_add(list(d))
})
```

```{r load_params, include=FALSE}
## SUSHI passes its `param` list serialised to disk by makeRmdReport().
library(ezRun)
param  <- ezLoadRobj("param")
output <- ezLoadRobj("output")

`%||%` <- function(a, b) {
  if (is.null(a)) return(b)
  if (is.character(a) && length(a) == 1 && nchar(a) == 0) return(b)
  a
}
.split_csv <- function(s) {
  if (is.null(s)) return(character(0))
  if (length(s) > 1) {
    out <- trimws(as.character(s))
    return(out[nzchar(out)])
  }
  if (is.character(s) && nchar(s) == 0) return(character(0))
  out <- trimws(unlist(strsplit(as.character(s), "[,;]")))
  out[nzchar(out)]
}
.as_logical <- function(x) {
  if (is.logical(x)) return(x)
  isTRUE(x) || identical(tolower(as.character(x)), "true") ||
    identical(tolower(as.character(x)), "yes")
}

## Each DiffShot* SUSHI app hardcodes daMethod; the report runs and shows only
## that one method's section. Recognised values: ALDEx2, ANCOMBC, MaAsLin3, LEfSe.
da_method_raw <- as.character(param$daMethod %||% "")
da_method     <- toupper(gsub("[^A-Za-z0-9]", "", da_method_raw))
if (!nzchar(da_method))
  stop("param$daMethod is empty - this Rmd is meant to be invoked by one of ",
       "the DiffShot{ALDEx,ANCOMBC,MaAsLin3,LEfSe}App apps.")
.method_map <- c(ALDEX2 = "ALDEx2", ANCOMBC = "ANCOMBC2", ANCOMBC2 = "ANCOMBC2",
                 MAASLIN3 = "MaAsLin3", MAASLIN = "MaAsLin3", LEFSE = "LEfSe")
if (!da_method %in% names(.method_map))
  stop("Unknown daMethod '", da_method_raw, "'. Accepted: ",
       paste(names(.method_map), collapse = ", "))
da_method_label <- .method_map[[da_method]]
```

```{r child_dispatch_setup, include=FALSE}
## The per-method child Rmd is staged into the working dir by ezMethodDiffShot
## before makeRmdReport runs. The dispatcher chunk further down loads it.
.method_child_map <- c(
  ALDEX2   = "DiffShot_aldex.Rmd",
  ANCOMBC  = "DiffShot_ancombc.Rmd",
  ANCOMBC2 = "DiffShot_ancombc.Rmd",
  MAASLIN3 = "DiffShot_maaslin3.Rmd",
  MAASLIN  = "DiffShot_maaslin3.Rmd",
  LEFSE    = "DiffShot_lefse.Rmd"
)
method_child <- .method_child_map[[da_method]]
if (!file.exists(method_child))
  stop("Child Rmd '", method_child, "' not in working dir. ",
       "Check that ezMethodDiffShot staged it before knitting.")
```

# Overview {#overview}

```{r source_type_setup, include=FALSE}
source_type <- tolower(as.character(param$sourceType %||% "bracken"))
source_label <- switch(source_type,
                       bracken   = "Kraken2 + Bracken",
                       metaphlan = "MetaPhlAn",
                       source_type)

## Pre-baked Markdown fragments. Constructed here (not as inline R) so the
## backticks used for code formatting do not collide with the `r ... ` syntax.
biom_sentence <- if (source_type == "bracken") {
  "The BIOM table is built from the per-sample Bracken reports with [`kraken-biom`](https://github.com/smdabdoub/kraken-biom)."
} else {
  "The BIOM table is built directly from the per-sample MetaPhlAn profiles via `biomformat::make_biom`, keeping only species-resolved rows."
}

values_sentence <- if (source_type == "bracken") {
  "Bracken outputs per-taxon read counts â€” a `features x samples` integer matrix."
} else if (da_method %in% c("ALDEX2","ANCOMBC","ANCOMBC2")) {
  "MetaPhlAn outputs were run with `-t rel_ab_w_read_stats`; the `estimated_number_of_reads_from_the_clade` column is used as the per-taxon count matrix that the count-based DA method requires."
} else {
  "MetaPhlAn outputs the per-taxon relative abundance (% per sample). Values are scaled to integer pseudo-counts (relab x 1e4) so the count-shaped pipeline (sample sums, prevalence filter, CPM / TSS normalisation) keeps working unchanged; the chosen method internally normalises this back to a relative scale."
}

method_sentence <- if (da_method == "ALDEX2") {
  "**ALDEx2** - CLR + Monte-Carlo Dirichlet. With covariates uses the GLM path (aldex.glm); without covariates the standard t-test path."
} else if (da_method %in% c("ANCOMBC","ANCOMBC2")) {
  "**ANCOM-BC2** - bias-corrected log-ratios with structural-zero handling. Covariates extend fix_formula."
} else if (da_method == "MAASLIN3") {
  "**MaAsLin 3** - GLMs testing abundance and prevalence associations. ReadDepth is added automatically as a covariate."
} else if (da_method == "LEFSE") {
  "**LEfSe** - non-parametric (Kruskal-Wallis + LDA) on relative abundance. Does NOT accept covariates by construction; results are unadjusted."
} else ""

caveat_origin <- if (source_type == "bracken") {
  "Bracken counts are *re-estimated* abundances"
} else {
  "MetaPhlAn counts are *estimated* from marker-gene coverage"
}
```

This report runs **`r da_method_label`** differential abundance (DA) analysis on
**shotgun metagenomics** taxonomic profiles produced by **`r source_label`**.
`r biom_sentence`

`r values_sentence`
The single test applied here is:

`r method_sentence`

> **Caveats.** (1) `r caveat_origin` â€” methods like ANCOM-BC2 and MaAsLin3 model that compositional shape natively. (2) Shotgun
> species tables are sparse; a prevalence / abundance filter is applied before
> testing. (3) MaAsLin3 docs strongly recommend including read depth as a
> covariate for prevalence models â€” it is added automatically.

---

# Configuration

```{r config}
## -----------------------------------------------------------------
## Inputs prepared by the SUSHI back-end in the working directory.
## -----------------------------------------------------------------
biom_path     <- "bracken_table.biom"
metadata_path <- "sample-metadata.tsv"

## -----------------------------------------------------------------
## Resolved from SUSHI params.
## -----------------------------------------------------------------
group_cols      <- param$grouping            %||% "Group"
sample_group    <- param$sampleGroup         %||% NA_character_
ref_group       <- param$refGroup            %||% NA_character_
da_group        <- "Group"                   # always the constructed col
da_covariates   <- setdiff(.split_csv(param$daCovariates), group_cols)
samples_to_prune <- .split_csv(param$samplesToDrop)

## LEfSe does not accept covariates; drop them if the LEfSe app somehow received
## any (its SUSHI form does not expose daCovariates, so this is belt-and-braces).
if (da_method == "LEFSE" && length(da_covariates) > 0) {
  message("LEfSe app: ignoring stray daCovariates (", paste(da_covariates, collapse = ", "), ").")
  da_covariates <- character(0)
}

## Reference factor levels - only the focal grouping (single column) is
## explicitly set; covariate columns use alphabetical defaults.
factor_reference <- setNames(ref_group, group_cols)
group_reference  <- ref_group                # 2-level Group after subset

## Filters / thresholds (defaults match the baseline ad-hoc Rmd).
prevalence_min   <- as.numeric(param$prevalenceMin    %||% 0.10)
relabund_min     <- as.numeric(param$relabundMin      %||% 0.10)
lib_cut          <- as.numeric(param$libCut           %||% 1000)
p_thresh         <- as.numeric(param$pValueThresh     %||% 0.05)
fc_thresh        <- as.numeric(param$log2RatioThresh  %||% 1)
maaslin_max_sig  <- as.numeric(param$maaslinMaxSig    %||% 0.1)

## -----------------------------------------------------------------
## Output
## -----------------------------------------------------------------
results_dir <- "results_out"
dir.create(results_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

## Standard table widget.
dt <- function(df, caption, sig = 3, length_menu = TRUE) {
  dom <- if (length_menu) 'lftBip' else 'ftBip'
  w <- datatable(df, caption = caption, extensions = 'Buttons', rownames = FALSE,
                 filter = 'top',
                 options = list(scrollX = TRUE, dom = dom,
                                buttons = c('copy', 'csv', 'excel'),
                                pageLength = 10, lengthMenu = c(10, 20, 100, 200)))
  num_cols <- names(df)[vapply(df, function(x) {
    if (!is.numeric(x)) return(FALSE)
    xf <- x[is.finite(x)]
    length(xf) > 0 && !isTRUE(all(xf == round(xf)))
  }, logical(1))]
  if (length(num_cols)) w <- formatSignif(w, columns = num_cols, digits = sig)
  w
}
save_csv <- function(df, fname) {
  fp <- file.path(results_dir, fname)
  write.csv(df, fp, row.names = FALSE)
  fp
}
gm_mean <- function(x, na.rm = TRUE) exp(sum(log(x[x > 0]), na.rm = na.rm) / length(x))
```

The DA analysis below contrasts on column **`r group_cols`**, with
**`r sample_group`** vs **`r ref_group`** (reference). Covariates being
adjusted for: **`r if (length(da_covariates)) paste(da_covariates, collapse=", ") else "(none)"`**.

# Data Loading

```{r load_data}
biom_obj <- read_biom(biom_path)
otu <- as(biom_data(biom_obj), "matrix")
otu <- otu_table(otu, taxa_are_rows = TRUE)

RANKS <- c("Kingdom","Phylum","Class","Order","Family","Genus","Species")
tax_raw <- observation_metadata(biom_obj)
if (is.data.frame(tax_raw)) {
  tax_mat <- as.matrix(tax_raw)
} else {
  tax_mat <- do.call(rbind, lapply(tax_raw, function(x) c(unlist(x), rep(NA, 7))[1:7]))
  if (!is.null(names(tax_raw))) rownames(tax_mat) <- names(tax_raw)
}
if (ncol(tax_mat) < 7)
  tax_mat <- cbind(tax_mat, matrix(NA_character_, nrow(tax_mat), 7 - ncol(tax_mat)))
tax_mat <- tax_mat[, 1:7, drop = FALSE]
tax_mat[] <- sub("^([a-z]__)+", "", tax_mat)
tax_mat[tax_mat == ""] <- NA
colnames(tax_mat) <- RANKS
if (!is.null(rownames(tax_mat)) && all(rownames(otu) %in% rownames(tax_mat))) {
  tax_mat <- tax_mat[rownames(otu), , drop = FALSE]
} else {
  stopifnot(nrow(tax_mat) == nrow(otu))
  rownames(tax_mat) <- rownames(otu)
}
TAX <- tax_table(tax_mat)

meta_df <- read.delim(metadata_path, header = TRUE, sep = "\t",
                      stringsAsFactors = FALSE, check.names = FALSE)
rownames(meta_df) <- meta_df[[1]]
SAMP <- sample_data(meta_df)
physeq <- phyloseq(otu, TAX, SAMP)

## Subset to the two requested levels in the focal grouping column.
if (!group_cols %in% colnames(sample_data(physeq)))
  stop("grouping column '", group_cols, "' not in metadata. Available: ",
       paste(colnames(sample_data(physeq)), collapse = ", "))
if (is.na(sample_group) || is.na(ref_group) || sample_group == ref_group)
  stop("sampleGroup and refGroup must be set to two DIFFERENT values of '",
       group_cols, "'.")
keep_smp <- as.character(sample_data(physeq)[[group_cols]]) %in%
            c(sample_group, ref_group)
if (!any(keep_smp))
  stop("No samples have grouping column '", group_cols, "' in {",
       sample_group, ", ", ref_group, "}.")
physeq <- prune_samples(keep_smp, physeq)

## Build the master Group column from the single focal column.
sample_data(physeq)$Group <- as.character(sample_data(physeq)[[group_cols]])

## Read depth (used as a MaAsLin3 covariate).
sample_data(physeq)$ReadDepth <- sample_sums(physeq)

if (length(samples_to_prune) > 0)
  physeq <- prune_samples(!sample_names(physeq) %in% samples_to_prune, physeq)

## Apply factor reference levels so every method reports sampleGroup-vs-refGroup.
.smp_df <- data.frame(sample_data(physeq), check.names = FALSE,
                      stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
.set_ref <- function(x, ref, col) {
  vals <- unique(as.character(x))
  vals <- vals[!is.na(vals) & vals != ""]
  if (!is.null(ref) && !is.na(ref) && ref %in% vals)
    factor(as.character(x), levels = c(ref, setdiff(vals, ref)))
  else {
    if (!is.null(ref) && !is.na(ref))
      warning("Reference level '", ref, "' for ", col,
              "' not in data; using alphabetical default")
    factor(as.character(x))
  }
}
for (cn in names(factor_reference)) {
  if (cn %in% colnames(.smp_df))
    .smp_df[[cn]] <- .set_ref(.smp_df[[cn]], factor_reference[[cn]], cn)
}
.smp_df[["Group"]] <- .set_ref(.smp_df[["Group"]], group_reference, "Group")
sample_data(physeq) <- sample_data(.smp_df)
```

# Filtering

Three filters are applied in sequence to the raw BIOM table before any DA test
is run. The cut-offs come from the SUSHI parameters and are shown live below.

1. **Sample drop-list** (`samplesToDrop`) â€” explicit per-sample exclusion (e.g.
   failed libraries). Currently dropping
   **`r if (length(samples_to_prune) == 0) "no samples" else paste(samples_to_prune, collapse = ", ")`**.
2. **Prevalence filter** (`prevalenceMin` = `r prevalence_min`) â€” keep a taxon
   only if it has **> 1 read in at least `r round(prevalence_min*100)` % of samples**
   (`phyloseq::genefilter_sample()`).
3. **Relative-abundance floor** (`relabundMin` = `r relabund_min`) â€” among the
   prevalence-surviving taxa, keep only those whose **total reads across all
   samples** make up **â‰Ą `r relabund_min` % of the pooled read sum**.
4. **Per-rank agglomeration** uses `phyloseq::tax_glom(..., NArm = TRUE)`,
   which **drops taxa whose lineage is unresolved at the target rank**.

The library-size floor `libCut` = **`r lib_cut`** is **not** applied here;
ANCOM-BC2 enforces it internally (`lib_cut` argument of `ancombc2`).

```{r filtering}
n_raw_taxa <- ntaxa(physeq); n_raw_samp <- nsamples(physeq)

keep_prev <- genefilter_sample(physeq, filterfun_sample(function(x) x > 1),
                               A = prevalence_min * nsamples(physeq))
physeq_prev <- prune_taxa(keep_prev, physeq)

total_reads <- sum(sample_sums(physeq_prev))
rel <- taxa_sums(physeq_prev) / total_reads * 100
physeq_filtered <- prune_taxa(rel >= relabund_min, physeq_prev)

metadata <- data.frame(sample_data(physeq_filtered))
metadata$SampleID <- rownames(metadata)

glom_safe <- function(ps, rank) {
  if (!rank %in% colnames(tax_table(ps))) return(NULL)
  if (all(is.na(as.data.frame(tax_table(ps))[[rank]]))) return(NULL)
  tryCatch(tax_glom(ps, rank, NArm = TRUE), error = function(e) NULL)
}
physeq_Species <- glom_safe(physeq_filtered, "Species")
physeq_Genus   <- glom_safe(physeq_filtered, "Genus")
has_species <- !is.null(physeq_Species)

filt_summary <- data.frame(
  Stage = c("Raw", "After prevalence filter", "After abundance filter"),
  Taxa  = c(n_raw_taxa, ntaxa(physeq_prev), ntaxa(physeq_filtered)),
  Samples = c(n_raw_samp, nsamples(physeq_prev), nsamples(physeq_filtered))
)
save_csv(filt_summary, "filtering_summary.csv")
dt(filt_summary, "Filtering summary", length_menu = FALSE)
```

```{r group_check}
## Per-level sample counts for the focal grouping AND every covariate, stacked
## into one long-format table so users can see Healthy/Asthma, Normal/Obese,
## F/M etc. counts in a single sortable view.
.show_cols <- c(da_group, intersect(da_covariates, colnames(metadata)))
grp_tab <- do.call(rbind, lapply(.show_cols, function(cn) {
  t <- as.data.frame(table(metadata[[cn]]), stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  data.frame(Column = cn, Level = as.character(t$Var1),
             n_samples = as.integer(t$Freq), stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
}))
save_csv(grp_tab, "group_sizes.csv")
dt(grp_tab,
   "Samples per Group and per covariate level",
   length_menu = FALSE)

## State the contrast info these depend on.
n_groups     <- length(unique(metadata$Group))
group_levels <- levels(as.factor(metadata$Group))
comps        <- if (n_groups >= 2) combn(group_levels, 2, simplify = FALSE) else list()

## Keep da_covariates pruned to columns actually present.
da_covariates <- intersect(da_covariates, colnames(metadata))
```

```{r group_check_crosstabs, results='asis'}
## Cross-tab each covariate against the focal Group; flag small cells.
## Separate chunk with results='asis' so the kable HTML is inserted into the
## document directly (not wrapped in '##' comment-output lines).
if (length(da_covariates)) {
  cat("**Group Ă— covariate cross-tabs** (cells with < 3 samples flagged).\n\n")
  for (cv in da_covariates) {
    tab <- table(Group = metadata$Group, metadata[[cv]])
    cat("\n#### ", cv, "\n\n", sep = "")
    cat(kableExtra::kable_styling(
          knitr::kable(tab, format = "html",
                       caption = paste0("Group x ", cv)),
          full_width = FALSE, position = "left"))
    cat("\n\n")
    if (any(tab < 3))
      cat("> :warning: Some cells have < 3 samples - covariate-adjusted models\n",
          "  that include `", cv, "` may be unstable.\n\n", sep = "")
  }
}
```

```{r da_helpers}
resolve_taxon_da <- function(ids, tax_tbl) {
  tax_df <- as.data.frame(tax_tbl)
  prefix <- c(Species = "", Genus = "g__", Family = "f__", Phylum = "p__")
  ids <- as.character(ids)
  vapply(ids, function(id) {
    if (id %in% rownames(tax_df)) {
      tx <- tax_df[id, ]
      for (r in c("Species", "Genus", "Family", "Phylum")) {
        val <- tx[[r]]
        if (!is.na(val) && val != "") {
          if (r == "Species") return(trimws(paste(tx$Genus, val)))
          return(paste0(prefix[[r]], val))
        }
      }
    }
    as.character(id)
  }, character(1))
}

volcano <- function(df, x, p, lab, title, xlab = "log2 fold change",
                    ylab = "-log10(adjusted p)", psig = p_thresh, fc = fc_thresh) {
  df <- df[is.finite(df[[x]]) & is.finite(df[[p]]), , drop = FALSE]
  if (nrow(df) == 0) { cat("No finite results to plot.\n"); return(invisible(NULL)) }
  EnhancedVolcano(df, lab = df[[lab]], x = x, y = p, xlab = xlab, ylab = ylab,
                  pCutoff = psig, FCcutoff = fc, title = title, subtitle = NULL,
                  legendPosition = "right", drawConnectors = TRUE,
                  maxoverlapsConnectors = Inf,
                  labSize = 3.0, pointSize = 1.8)
}

volcano_i <- function(df, x, p, lab, title, xlab = "log2 fold change",
                      ylab = "-log10(adjusted p)", psig = p_thresh, fc = fc_thresh) {
  df <- df[is.finite(df[[x]]) & is.finite(df[[p]]), , drop = FALSE]
  if (nrow(df) == 0) { cat("No finite results to plot.\n"); return(invisible(NULL)) }
  d <- data.frame(eff = df[[x]], pval = df[[p]], lab = as.character(df[[lab]]),
                  stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  d$neglog10p <- -log10(d$pval)
  sig_p  <- d$pval < psig
  sig_fc <- abs(d$eff) > fc
  d$Category <- ifelse(sig_p & sig_fc & d$eff > 0, "Up & sig",
                ifelse(sig_p & sig_fc & d$eff < 0, "Down & sig",
                ifelse(sig_p,                      "Sig (p only)", "NS")))
  d$Category <- factor(d$Category,
                       levels = c("Up & sig", "Down & sig", "Sig (p only)", "NS"))
  cols <- c("Up & sig" = "#e41a1c", "Down & sig" = "#377eb8",
            "Sig (p only)" = "#4daf4a", "NS" = "grey70")
  plab <- sub("^-log10\\(\\s*(.*?)\\s*\\)$", "\\1", ylab)
  if (identical(plab, ylab)) plab <- "p"
  g <- ggplot(d, aes(eff, neglog10p, color = Category,
                     text = paste0(lab, "<br>", xlab, ": ", round(eff, 3),
                                   "<br>", plab, ": ", signif(pval, 3)))) +
    geom_point(size = 1.8, alpha = 0.8) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(-fc, fc), linetype = 2, color = "grey50") +
    geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(psig), linetype = 2, color = "grey50") +
    scale_color_manual(values = cols, name = NULL, drop = FALSE) +
    labs(x = xlab, y = ylab, title = title) + theme_bw()
  ggplotly(g, tooltip = "text")
}

mk_volcano_df <- function(df, xcol, pcol, labcol) {
  if (is.null(df) || !all(c(xcol, pcol, labcol) %in% colnames(df))) return(NULL)
  d <- data.frame(eff = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(df[[xcol]])),
                  pval = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(df[[pcol]])),
                  lab = as.character(df[[labcol]]), stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  d <- d[is.finite(d$eff) & is.finite(d$pval), , drop = FALSE]
  d$pval[d$pval <= 0] <- .Machine$double.xmin
  if (nrow(d) == 0) NULL else d
}
show_volcano_static <- function(d, title, xlab, ylab = "-log10(adjusted p)",
                                psig = p_thresh, fc = fc_thresh) {
  if (is.null(d)) { cat("No finite results to plot.\n"); return(invisible(NULL)) }
  print(volcano(d, "eff", "pval", "lab", title = title, xlab = xlab,
                ylab = ylab, psig = psig, fc = fc))
}
show_volcano_interactive <- function(d, title, xlab, ylab = "-log10(adjusted p)",
                                     psig = p_thresh, fc = fc_thresh) {
  if (is.null(d)) { cat("No finite results to plot.\n"); return(invisible(NULL)) }
  volcano_i(d, "eff", "pval", "lab", title = title, xlab = xlab,
            ylab = ylab, psig = psig, fc = fc)
}
```

```{r da_runner_libs, include=FALSE}
## Load only the package(s) the active method needs.
if (da_method == "ALDEX2")            library(ALDEx2)
if (da_method %in% c("ANCOMBC","ANCOMBC2")) library(ANCOMBC)
if (da_method == "LEFSE")             library(microbiomeMarker)
if (da_method == "MAASLIN3")          library(maaslin3)
```

```{r da_runner}
## --- ALDEx2 ----------------------------------------------------------
run_aldex2 <- function(ps, rank) {
  cnts  <- as(otu_table(ps), "matrix"); if (!taxa_are_rows(ps)) cnts <- t(cnts)
  grp   <- as.character(sample_data(ps)[[da_group]])
  if (length(unique(grp)) != 2) {
    clr <- aldex.clr(cnts, grp, mc.samples = 128, denom = "all", verbose = FALSE)
    kw  <- aldex.kw(clr)
    res <- kw %>% rownames_to_column("taxon")
  } else if (length(da_covariates) == 0) {
    x   <- aldex(cnts, grp, mc.samples = 128, test = "t", effect = TRUE,
                 denom = "all", verbose = FALSE)
    res <- x %>% rownames_to_column("taxon")
  } else {
    terms <- c(da_covariates, da_group)
    md    <- data.frame(sample_data(ps), check.names = FALSE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
    md    <- md[, !duplicated(colnames(md)), drop = FALSE]
    md    <- data.frame(lapply(terms, function(v) {
              x <- md[[v]]
              if (is.numeric(x))    as.numeric(x)
              else if (is.factor(x)) x
              else                   factor(as.character(x))
            }), row.names = rownames(md), stringsAsFactors = FALSE, check.names = FALSE)
    colnames(md) <- terms
    form  <- as.formula(paste("~", paste(terms, collapse = " + ")))
    mm    <- model.matrix(form, data = md)
    clr   <- aldex.clr(cnts, mm, mc.samples = 128, denom = "all", verbose = FALSE)
    glm.t <- aldex.glm(clr, mm)
    ## aldex.glm column-naming has shifted across ALDEx2 versions, e.g.:
    ##   <=1.32: "<term>:Est"      / "<term>:Pr(>|t|)."  / "<term>:Pr(>|t|).BH"
    ##    1.42 : "<term>:Est"      / "<term>:pval"        / "<term>:pval.padj"
    cn       <- colnames(glm.t)
    grp_cols <- cn[grepl(da_group, cn, fixed = TRUE)]
    if (length(grp_cols) == 0)
      stop("aldex.glm produced no columns containing the Group term '",
           da_group, "'. Columns: ", paste(head(cn, 30), collapse = ", "))
    bh_col <- grp_cols[grepl("(BH|padj|adjust)", grp_cols)][1]
    p_col  <- grp_cols[grepl("(pval|Pr\\(>\\|t\\|\\))", grp_cols) &
                       !grepl("(BH|padj|adjust)", grp_cols)][1]
    pe_col <- grp_cols[grepl("Est(imate)?", grp_cols)][1]
    if (is.na(pe_col) || is.na(p_col) || is.na(bh_col))
      stop("aldex.glm output is missing one of (Estimate, p, BH) columns for ",
           "the '", da_group, "' term. Matched group cols: ",
           paste(grp_cols, collapse = ", "))
    res <- data.frame(
      taxon  = rownames(glm.t),
      effect = glm.t[[pe_col]],
      wi.ep  = glm.t[[p_col]],
      wi.eBH = glm.t[[bh_col]],
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  }
  res$Taxonomy <- resolve_taxon_da(res$taxon, tax_table(ps))
  save_csv(res, paste0("aldex2_", tolower(rank), ".csv"))
  res
}

## --- ANCOM-BC2 -------------------------------------------------------
run_ancombc2 <- function(ps, rank) {
  set.seed(123)
  fix_form <- paste(c(da_group, da_covariates), collapse = " + ")
  out <- ancombc2(
    data = ps, fix_formula = fix_form, p_adj_method = "BH",
    prv_cut = prevalence_min, lib_cut = lib_cut, group = da_group,
    struc_zero = TRUE, neg_lb = FALSE, pseudo_sens = FALSE,
    global = (n_groups > 2), pairwise = (n_groups > 2),
    dunnet = (n_groups > 2), trend = FALSE, alpha = p_thresh,
    iter_control = list(tol = 1e-2, max_iter = 20, verbose = FALSE),
    em_control = list(tol = 1e-5, max_iter = 100))
  for (slot in c("res", "res_pair", "res_dunn")) {
    if (!is.null(out[[slot]]) && "taxon" %in% colnames(out[[slot]])) {
      out[[slot]]$Taxonomy <- resolve_taxon_da(out[[slot]]$taxon, tax_table(ps))
      save_csv(out[[slot]], paste0("ancombc2_", tolower(rank), "_", slot, ".csv"))
    }
  }
  out
}

## --- LEfSe (covariate-blind, by design) ------------------------------
run_lefse_tab <- function(ps, rank) {
  tryCatch({
    mm <- run_lefse(ps, norm = "CPM", group = da_group,
                    taxa_rank = rank, kw_cutoff = 1.0, wilcoxon_cutoff = 1.0,
                    lda_cutoff = 0)
    mt <- marker_table(mm)
    if (is.null(mt) || nrow(mt) == 0) return(NULL)
    df <- data.frame(lapply(as.data.frame(mt), as.vector), stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
    df$ef_lda <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(df$ef_lda))
    df$pvalue <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(df$pvalue))
    df$padj <- p.adjust(df$pvalue, method = "BH")
    df$Significant <- df$pvalue < p_thresh & abs(df$ef_lda) >= 2
    df <- df[order(-df$Significant, -abs(df$ef_lda)), , drop = FALSE]
    save_csv(df, paste0("lefse_", tolower(rank), ".csv"))
    df
  }, error = function(e) { cat("LEfSe ", rank, " skipped: ", e$message, "\n"); NULL })
}

## --- MaAsLin3 --------------------------------------------------------
run_maaslin3 <- function(ps, rank) {
  cnts <- as(otu_table(ps), "matrix"); if (taxa_are_rows(ps)) cnts <- t(cnts)
  feat <- data.frame(cnts, check.names = FALSE)
  md0  <- data.frame(sample_data(ps), check.names = FALSE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  md0  <- md0[, !duplicated(colnames(md0)), drop = FALSE]
  terms <- c(da_group, da_covariates)
  if ("ReadDepth" %in% colnames(md0)) terms <- c(terms, "ReadDepth")
  terms <- unique(terms)
  md   <- data.frame(lapply(terms, function(v) {
            x <- md0[[v]]
            if (is.numeric(x))    as.numeric(x)
            else if (is.factor(x)) x
            else                   factor(as.character(x))
          }), row.names = rownames(md0), stringsAsFactors = FALSE, check.names = FALSE)
  colnames(md) <- terms
  form  <- paste("~", paste(terms, collapse = " + "))
  outd  <- file.path(results_dir, paste0("maaslin3_", tolower(rank)))
  dir.create(outd, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
  .maaslin3_call <- function(plots_on) {
    maaslin3(input_data = feat, input_metadata = md, output = outd,
             formula = as.formula(form), normalization = "TSS", transform = "LOG",
             augment = TRUE, standardize = TRUE,
             max_significance = maaslin_max_sig,
             median_comparison_abundance = TRUE,
             median_comparison_prevalence = FALSE,
             max_pngs = 100, save_models = TRUE,
             plot_summary_plot = plots_on, plot_associations = plots_on, cores = 1)
  }
  fit <- tryCatch(.maaslin3_call(TRUE), error = function(e) {
    cat("MaAsLin3 ", rank, " plotting failed (", e$message,
        "); retrying with plots off.\n", sep = "")
    tryCatch(.maaslin3_call(FALSE), error = function(e2) {
      cat("MaAsLin3 ", rank, " failed without plots: ", e2$message, "\n"); NULL })
  })
  allf <- file.path(outd, "all_results.tsv")
  res  <- if (file.exists(allf))
            read.delim(allf, sep = "\t", stringsAsFactors = FALSE,
                       colClasses = c(feature = "character"))
          else NULL
  if (is.null(fit) && is.null(res)) return(NULL)
  if (!is.null(res) && "feature" %in% colnames(res))
    res$Taxonomy <- resolve_taxon_da(res$feature, tax_table(ps))
  if (!is.null(res)) save_csv(res, paste0("maaslin3_", tolower(rank), "_all_results.csv"))
  list(fit = fit, res = res, outdir = outd)
}
```

---

# Abundance {.tabset}

```{r abund_section_setup, include=FALSE}
abundance_units <- if (source_type == "bracken") {
  "per-taxon read counts as written by Bracken (integers)"
} else if (da_method %in% c("ALDEX2","ANCOMBC","ANCOMBC2")) {
  "the MetaPhlAn `estimated_number_of_reads_from_the_clade` column (integers)"
} else {
  "MetaPhlAn relative abundance scaled to integer pseudo-counts (relab% x 1e4)"
}
```

The wide-format **taxon Ă— sample** matrix that feeds the DA test below â€” i.e.
the post-filter input the method actually sees. Values are `r abundance_units`.
Tables are downloadable (copy / CSV / Excel) and saved to `r results_dir`/.

```{r abund_helpers, include=FALSE}
make_abund_table <- function(ps) {
  if (is.null(ps)) return(NULL)
  otu <- as(otu_table(ps), "matrix")
  if (!taxa_are_rows(ps)) otu <- t(otu)
  if (nrow(otu) == 0) return(NULL)
  taxa_lab <- resolve_taxon_da(rownames(otu), tax_table(ps))
  ## De-dupe collisions by appending a counter (rare with tax_glom output).
  if (anyDuplicated(taxa_lab)) {
    dup <- duplicated(taxa_lab) | duplicated(taxa_lab, fromLast = TRUE)
    taxa_lab[dup] <- paste0(taxa_lab[dup], " (", rownames(otu)[dup], ")")
  }
  df <- data.frame(Taxon = taxa_lab, otu,
                   check.names = FALSE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  ord <- order(-rowSums(otu, na.rm = TRUE))
  df[ord, , drop = FALSE]
}
```

## Species
```{r abund_species_tab, eval=has_species}
abund_sp_df <- make_abund_table(physeq_Species)
if (!is.null(abund_sp_df)) {
  save_csv(abund_sp_df, "abundance_species.csv")
  dt(abund_sp_df, paste0("Species â€” ", nrow(abund_sp_df), " taxa Ă— ",
                         ncol(abund_sp_df) - 1, " samples"))
} else cat("No Species-level taxa survived filtering.\n")
```

## Genus
```{r abund_genus_tab}
abund_ge_df <- make_abund_table(physeq_Genus)
if (!is.null(abund_ge_df)) {
  save_csv(abund_ge_df, "abundance_genus.csv")
  dt(abund_ge_df, paste0("Genus â€” ", nrow(abund_ge_df), " taxa Ă— ",
                         ncol(abund_ge_df) - 1, " samples"))
} else cat("No Genus-level taxa survived filtering.\n")
```

---

# Differential Abundance {.tabset}

> Contrast on **`r da_group`**
> (`r paste(group_levels, collapse = ", ")`)`r if (length(da_covariates)) paste0(", adjusted for **", paste(da_covariates, collapse = "**, **"), "**") else ""`.
> Method runs at the **Species** and **Genus** levels (Species skipped
> automatically if no species-level taxa survive filtering). Tables are
> downloadable (copy / CSV / Excel) and also written to `r results_dir`/.

```{r run_method_section, child=method_child}
```

---

# Downloads {.tabset}

## All result tables (CSV)
```{r downloads_csv, results='asis'}
csvs <- sort(list.files(results_dir, pattern = "\\.csv$",
                        full.names = TRUE, recursive = TRUE))
if (length(csvs) == 0) cat("No CSVs written yet.\n") else {
  cat("All CSV tables written to `", results_dir, "/`:\n\n", sep = "")
  for (f in csvs) cat(paste0("- [", basename(f), "](", f, ")\n"))
}
```

```{r downloads_maaslin, results='asis', eval=(da_method == "MAASLIN3")}
cat("## MaAsLin3 native outputs\n\n")
mdirs <- list.dirs(results_dir, recursive = FALSE)
mdirs <- mdirs[grepl("maaslin3_", basename(mdirs))]
if (length(mdirs) == 0) cat("No MaAsLin3 output folders.\n") else {
  for (d in mdirs) {
    cat("**", basename(d), "**\n\n", sep = "")
    for (f in c("summary_plot.pdf", "all_results.tsv", "significant_results.tsv")) {
      fp <- file.path(d, f)
      if (file.exists(fp)) cat(paste0("- [", f, "](", fp, ")\n"))
    }
    cat("\n")
  }
}
```

---

# Session info

<details><summary>Click to expand</summary>

```{r session}
sessionInfo()
```

</details>
